Event: Magic Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 20/11/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR340
Court Wizard Outfit

Once in a while, the unit removes all negative effects from self and 3 nearest allied units, increases all stats of the targets by 55% for 5 sec., and grants shields equal to 280% of the armor owner's spell power to the targets. These shields block damage of any type and exist up to 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Magic Treasure Hunt

Event date: 20/11/2025

Sage bot code: AR340

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 11 secs
